form.label: Pi-hole Domains
form.description: Domain popularity, block reasons, clients, CNAME blocking, and newly observed names.

search.query: | stats count as queries count(eval(action="blocked")) as blocked dc(src) as clients values(status) as statuses values(query_type) as types avg(eval(if(reply_time_ms>=0,reply_time_ms,null()))) as avg_reply_ms max(_time) as last_seen by query | eval block_rate=round(100*blocked/queries,2),avg_reply_ms=round(avg_reply_ms,2) | convert ctime(last_seen) | sort - queries
| timechart span=5m count by action useother=f
| stats count by src | sort - count | head 20
| search action=blocked | stats count as blocks dc(src) as clients values(status) as mechanisms values(list_id) as list_ids values(cname) as cname_target by query | sort - blocks | head 100
| where isnotnull(cname) | stats count as blocks dc(src) as clients values(status) as mechanisms by query cname | sort - blocks | head 100

table.title: Domains first observed in the last 24 hours

search.query: `pihole_queries` pihole_node="$node$" earliest=-30d | stats min(_time) as first_seen max(_time) as last_seen count dc(src) as clients by query | where first_seen>=relative_time(now(),"-24h") | convert ctime(first_seen) ctime(last_seen) | sort - first_seen | head 200
